notes: gary v4 is stable: SA3 is now in the Jerry tab with generate, loop, transform, continue, LoRAs, seed recall, key/scale prompting, and smart dice.
Local SA3 on Windows needs gary4local v0.1.11.
DAW-play recording is less likely to miss the first host buffer if the UI is busy.
Close your DAW before replacing plugin files with a downloaded update.
